'''Krotorra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who served as a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representative from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was captured by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] and sold to the [[Vax Mining Group]].<ref name="WBC" />
